# Backlog — open doors & rabbit holes

*A living to-do for the World Economy Lab, generated by a full-report scan
(13 chapter-scanners + a synthesizer, 2026-07-20). Ranked by value × feasibility,
favoring **CITED → COMPUTED** conversions and genuinely new domains. Feasibility
tags: `computable-now` (data already in the warehouse) · `needs-fetch` (new
connector) · `curated` (hand-cited, hard to recompute) · `hard` (measurement floor
the report already concedes).*

## Execution queue — cheapest → hardest (12 remaining)

*Two done: N-PX per-company engine (Ch10 F4, `7a11b69`) and the judge-ownership
conflict surface (Ch10 F19, `9712bf2`). The rest, queued by effort:*

### Tier 1 — quick / computable-now
1. **Effective average funding rate into every r−g figure** *(Ch02, quick,
   computable-now).* F7's "r" is the 10-yr Treasury, not the government's actual
   (smoother, lagged) average rate. TreasuryDirect / FRED publishes it.
2. **Forbes billionaires → dated wealth-concentration time series** *(Ch00/06/09/11/12,
   quick, source ingested).* The one source with a single 2026 cut; date-stamp it and
   accumulate snapshots — the report's only potential live wealth series.
3. **Refresh the FAO forest-ownership ledger to FRA 2020/2025** *(Ch07, quick fetch).*
   Forests are the only land class with global ownership reporting; pinned to the stale
   FRA 2015 (73% public / 22% private). The chapter's highest-value update.
4. **Deepen WID: post-tax income U-curve + multi-country panel** *(Ch06/09, medium,
   mostly computable-now).* The post-tax U-curve is asserted but never computed and the
   income round-trip rests on just US+France; WID `ptinc` + long series are in-warehouse.

### Tier 2 — medium (needs-fetch)
5. **TIC by-country Treasury-holdings backfill** *(Ch02/05/12).* Splice archived pre-2023
   `mfh.txt` to the live `slt_table5` to track the custody veil & China-selling over time.
6. **Military financing (FMF/DSCA) added to the US-aid reach map** *(Ch02).* The aid map
   is ODA-only and understates Israel/Egypt/Ukraine; DSCA/State FMF reorders the ranking.
7. **Arms trade in dollars + top-10 milex bars** *(Ch02).* F12's SIPRI TIV is a volume
   proxy — can't answer "who profits"; add SIPRI Arms-Industry sales + Milex.
8. **RMB swap network + FIMA repo, head-to-head with the Fed** *(Ch02/12).* Quantify
   China's ~40-country renminbi swaps + the NY Fed FIMA facility vs the Fed's lines.
9. **Computed sovereign-default dataset (BoC–BoE) replacing curated R&R** *(Ch05).*
   Reproducible default-event counts; test "institutions, not debt levels."
10. **UN WPP low/high fertility fan charts** *(Ch01/04/12).* Bracket the 10.29B/2084 peak
    and the aging story with honest uncertainty instead of the single medium variant.

### Tier 3 — large (new domains)
11. **Open the state-and-local capture domain** *(Ch10/12).* Census public-pension survey
    (~$6T), USASpending assistance, Good Jobs First subsidies, MSRB munis, FCC auctions —
    turn F16's anecdotes into distributions.
12. **Computed board-interlock network from SEC Form 4** *(Ch05/09/12).* Ch10-F5's "the
    loop closes on itself" has no computed graph; build it from the free EDGAR feed.

## Quick wins (cheapest value — mostly a date-stamp away)

- **Scheduled `econ refresh` cadence** for live reads that silently age: CAPE
  (41.4), the yield curve, COFER dollar share, IMF WEO, Pink Sheet, DFA, NASS, and
  the July-2026 state-of-the-world dashboard. (Ch00/02/03/04/06/08/12)
- **Forbes billionaire snapshot**: add a date-stamp + scheduled re-fetch now.
- **COFER full time series as a figure** (76%→56%): already in the warehouse, cited
  only at two endpoints.
- **Big-3 ownership as a computed line**: `edgar13f` already computes big3_shares —
  upgrade the curated "5%→22% since 1998" endpoints to a live line for free.
- **WID top-1% / top-0.1% arc as a continuous line**: tapped only at 3–4 snapshots.
- **Decompose Argentina's fall** (60%→31% of US income) into inflation vs default vs
  stagnation — all three series are in the warehouse.
- **Rank South Korea's "greatest catch-up on record"** against the full cross-country
  1960→2022 distribution (Maddison, in warehouse).
- **Warehouse-wide staleness sweep** generalizing the single TIC recency test.
- **Fed IORB / deferred-loss series** from FRED H.4.1 (stated once, moves monthly).
- **Global current-account imbalance series since ~1980** from WEO (F5 shows only a
  2024 snapshot of a persistence story).

## Cross-chapter themes

- **Ownership & control opacity** — N-PX per-company votes, Form-4 interlocks, the
  $2.97T custody veil, offshore holdings, Norway fund's "1.5% of every listed firm."
- **Curated → computed** — sovereign defaults (BoC-BoE), dynasty capital series,
  Land Report 100, FDIC/BIS founding dates, Ch10-F1 chokepoint market shares.
- **Staleness & refresh cadence** — the most pervasive theme (8 chapters); cheapest
  wins live here.
- **Monetary architecture & the reach of the dollar** — RMB swaps + FIMA, FMF in the
  aid map, de-dollarization basket decomposition, effective funding rate.
- **Deep-time measurement floors** (report-conceded) — pre-1950 colonial GDP,
  pre-1820 12-economy sample, DFA blind before 1989, PPP-vintage sensitivity.
- **Distributional fine-grain** — WPP fertility fans, metro/county housing, item-
  level CPI (cheapflation), by-segment interest rates, post-tax & net-worth shares.
- **New public-data domains** — state/local capture, the commons giveaway (1872
  mining, grazing, spectrum), judge conflict dockets, earmark-per-capita map.
- **Robustness sweeps on thin samples** — yield-curve (6 cycles), yen-haven (one
  2022 outlier), $3,000 takeoff threshold, CAPE overlapping-window error bars, σ
  panel sensitivity.

## The standing frontier (honest floors — poor effort-to-payoff, not ranked)

Beneficial owners behind the **$2.97T custody veil**; offshore wealth; **pre-1950
colonial GDP** (Maddison lower bounds); **emoluments** (never adjudicated). The
report already flags these; they are measurement limits, not expeditions.
